mapper.select: SELECT a.id AS withdrawId, a.id AS payMethodId, a.withdraw_way_i18 AS withdrawWayI18 FROM system_withdraw_way a

select a.id AS payMethodId, a.way_fee AS wayFee, a.withdraw_id AS withdrawId, b.withdraw_way AS withdrawWayCode, b.withdraw_way_i18 AS withdrawWayI18 from site_withdraw_way a inner join system_withdraw_way b on a.site_code = #{siteCode} and a.withdraw_id = b.id where a.status = 1 and b.withdraw_type_code = #{typeCode}

select a.id AS payMethodId, a.way_fee AS wayFee, a.withdraw_id AS withdrawId, b.withdraw_way AS withdrawWayCode, b.withdraw_way_i18 AS withdrawWayI18, b.withdraw_type_code AS withdrawTypeCode from site_withdraw_way a inner join system_withdraw_way b on a.site_code = #{siteCode} and a.withdraw_id = b.id where a.status = 1

select sw.withdraw_id as withdrawId, sysw.withdraw_way_i18 from site_withdraw_way sw join system_withdraw_way sysw on sw.withdraw_id = sysw.id where sw.site_code = #{siteCode} and sysw.currency_code =#{currencyCode}

SELECT site.withdraw_id withdrawId, site.site_code siteCode, site.way_fee wayFee, site.way_fee_fixed_amount wayFeeFixedAmount, way.currency_code currencyCode, m.message as withdrawWayName FROM site_withdraw_way site left join system_withdraw_way way on way.id = site.withdraw_id left join i18n_message m on way.withdraw_way_i18 = m.message_key and m.`language` ='zh-CN' WHERE site.site_code = #{siteCode}

SELECT b.collect_info FROM site_withdraw_way a LEFT JOIN system_withdraw_way b ON b.id = a.withdraw_id WHERE a.site_code = #{siteCode} AND a.status = 1 AND b.status = 1 AND b.withdraw_type_code = #{withdrawTypeCode} AND b.currency_code = #{currencyCode}
